name: X-Golf Fairlawn
about: X-Golf Fairlawn is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines high-accuracy technology with a social sports bar environment. It features 8 state-of-the-art simulators utilizing camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide a realistic golf experience. The venue caters to a range of patrons, from beginners to serious golfers, offering playing time, professional coaching, and a full bar and food menu. Pricing is structured per simulator per hour, accommodating up to six people per bay, with rates varying by day and time.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology
Social atmosphere with full bar and restaurant
Flexible indoor play regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen offering shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas.
Full liquor bar with beer on tap, by the glass, as well as cocktails and wines.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, bringing your own clubs is encouraged but not required. Club rentals are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. X-Golf has a full kitchen and bar available for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. With more players, you may want to book an additional hour per person.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome to play at X-Golf Fairlawn.
